add_key.method: PIN-based OBD adaptation where supported after identifying the fitted immobiliser generation
add_key.programming_method: Identify the cluster or separate immobiliser box before selecting the procedure
warnings: No operation-specific tool is shown until current manufacturer coverage for the exact Polo 6N immobiliser system is confirmed.

all_keys_lost.method: Acquire the required PIN or immobiliser EEPROM data, prepare the correct transponder and adapt all keys
warnings: Confirm whether the vehicle uses a cluster-based or separate immobiliser box before removing or reading any module.

add_key.method: OBD adaptation or saved immobiliser-data route after identifying the exact cluster
add_key.programming_method: Volkswagen Immo3 or early Immo4 cluster-specific procedure

obdstar_g3.summary: OBDSTAR documents Volkswagen third- and fourth-generation immobiliser key programming, including Polo applications, but the exact cluster must be identified first.

vehicle_connection.display_text: Standard OBD on supported clusters; dashboard-data access may be required

warnings: Confirm whether the vehicle is Immo3 or early Immo4 and check the current device menu before programming.

all_keys_lost.method: Read the required cluster immobiliser data, prepare the dealer key where required and learn all keys
all_keys_lost.programming_method: OBD or dashboard-data route depending on the fitted cluster
all_keys_lost.online_requirement: Not Required for supported local data routes

obdstar_g3.summary: AKL is conditional on the fitted Immo3 or Immo4 cluster being supported by the current Volkswagen software.

vehicle_connection.display_text: OBD or cluster-specific bench connection after module identification

warnings: Secure and verify the original immobiliser data before preparing or learning keys.

add_key.method: Diagnostic or saved-data route depending on the installed Immo4 dashboard
add_key.programming_method: Dashboard-specific Volkswagen Immo4 Add Key procedure

obdstar_g3.summary: Volkswagen Immo4 key programming is supported where the exact Polo dashboard appears in the current device coverage.

vehicle_connection.display_text: Standard OBD or dashboard-data route depending on cluster

warnings: Identify the dashboard family and current software coverage before beginning the operation.

all_keys_lost.method: Acquire the supported dashboard immobiliser data, prepare a dealer key and learn all keys
all_keys_lost.online_requirement: Not Required for supported local data routes

obdstar_g3.summary: AKL support depends on the fitted Immo4 dashboard processor and EEPROM being covered by the current software and adapter route.
warnings: Do not assume every Polo 6R dashboard uses the same memory or data-reading route.

add_key.method: Supported diagnostic or saved-data route after exact dashboard identification
add_key.programming_method: Late cluster-based Volkswagen Add Key procedure

obdstar_g3.summary: Polo is included in OBDSTAR Volkswagen key-programming coverage, but late 6C dashboard support must be checked by exact unit.

vehicle_connection.display_text: Standard OBD or supported dashboard-data route

warnings: Keep Polo 6R and 6C dashboard coverage separate and confirm the current device menu.

all_keys_lost.method: Confirm dashboard coverage, obtain the immobiliser data and learn all keys using the supported route
all_keys_lost.programming_method: Late dashboard data route only where explicitly supported

obdstar_g3.summary: AKL is conditional on the fitted late dashboard being included in current Immo4 or MQB-related coverage.
warnings: Verify the processor, EEPROM family and supported adapter before removing or reading the dashboard.

add_key.method: OBD, saved MQB data or supported working-key route after identifying the exact dashboard and keyless specification

autel_im508s_xp400_pro.summary: Autel APB300 provides a working-key Add Key route for supported Volkswagen Group MQB applications.

vehicle_connection.display_text: Open and read the original working key using APB300

tool_accessory_ids: Supported Autel VW-style IKEY or key PCB
warnings: Confirm that the exact Polo key and platform are included in the current APB300 coverage.
This working-key route does not establish All Keys Lost support.

obdstar_g3.summary: MQB key programming is available only where the fitted MQB48 dashboard is supported by the current software.

vehicle_connection.display_text: OBD or supported dashboard-data route depending on the installed cluster

warnings: Identify the MQB dashboard generation and keyed or keyless configuration before proceeding.

all_keys_lost.method: Read supported MQB dashboard data, calculate the required security data, prepare the dealer key and learn all keys

obdstar_g3.summary: AKL is available only when the Polo AW dashboard is a supported MQB48 type and the required adapter route is available.

vehicle_connection.display_text: RH850/V850 or other dashboard-specific adapter route where required

warnings: Confirm the dashboard processor and current MQB generation coverage before accepting the AKL job.

add_key.method: Current platform-specific Add Key route only after VIN, key type and live tool coverage confirmation

autel_im508s_xp400_pro.summary: Autel APB300 may provide a working-key Add Key route where the exact later MQB key is supported.

vehicle_connection.display_text: Read the opened original working key with APB300

tool_accessory_ids: Supported Autel VW-style IKEY or key PCB
warnings: Check the current Autel coverage against the exact key and vehicle before booking the job.
Do not treat APB300 Add Key support as proof of AKL coverage.

all_keys_lost.method: Confirm current aftermarket coverage before accepting the job
all_keys_lost.programming_method: Later protected MQB AKL support check
warnings: No universal operation-specific AKL tool support is shown for the Polo AW facelift.
Confirm VIN, dashboard, key type and live tool coverage before dismantling or preparing a key.
